class.name: SlangShaderEditorPlugin
class.description: Enables importing and dispatching shaders written in Slang.

method.name: get_modules_path
method.description: Gets the (globalized) path containing the Slang modules included with this plugin.

method.name: get_preprocessor_macros
method.description: Gets the preprocessor macros declared for modules included with this plugin. For example, this includes the GODOT_MAJOR_VERSION and GODOT_MINOR_VERSION macros.
